title: pelargonium × parmentieri
intro: Pelargonium × parmentieri, also known as the Rose Geranium or Geranium, is a hybrid plant species in the Geraniaceae family, known for its distinctive rose-like fragrance and medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds such as linalool and geraniol, which have been used to treat various health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Pelargonium × parmentieri include its ability to reduce stress, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation, improve mood, and soothe skin conditions.
